name: validator
description: Rule-engine validator + Templater hook handler. Reads ranch/rules/* and validates a file. v0.2.0 MINOR (v0.47.0): NEW Layer 2 type-field convention rule — every blueprint with rule_fragments[*] whose body declares when.frontmatter.type AND with new_entity_buttons[] entries MUST declare matching "type": "<value>" in each new_entity_buttons[*].frontmatter_template. Rule lives in platform/install.js as _validateTypeFieldConvention (validate.js operates per-file at runtime; manifest-level enforcement lives upstream at install-time). Closes BUG-2 from headspace Phase 3 (people manifest shipped without type:person; type-filtered queries skipped new entries). At v0.47.0 no current blueprint trips the gate; the rule is forward-defense.

external_plugins.reason: Surface /validate slash command for ad-hoc validation.

post_install.message: Reload Templater after install (Settings → Templater → reload user scripts).
